  1. logicControllers

Uses of Package
logicControllers

Package
Description
ControllerTest
 
commands
 
logicControllers
 
  • Classes in logicControllers used by ControllerTest
    Class
    Description
    ReservationController
    Controller class responsible for handling the logic of restaurant reservations.
  • Classes in logicControllers used by commands
    Class
    Description
    PaymentController
    Controller class responsible for handling the payment process within the restaurant.
    ReservationController
    Controller class responsible for handling the logic of restaurant reservations.
    RestaurantSettingsController
    Controller class responsible for managing restaurant settings, including opening hours, special dates, and table capacity.
    TableController
    Controller responsible for physical table management within the restaurant.
    TableSettingsController
    Controller responsible for the administrative configuration of restaurant tables.
    UserController
    Server-side logic controller for users.
    WaitingListController
    Controller responsible for managing the restaurant's waiting list and real-time reservation logic.

    Class
    Description
    PaymentController
    Controller class responsible for handling the payment process within the restaurant.
    TableController
    Controller responsible for physical table management within the restaurant.
